posts.title: Understanding O. Reg. 406/19: What Ontario Contractors Need to Know
posts.excerpt: Ontario's excess soil regulation continues to evolve. Here's what constructors, developers, and property owners need to know to stay compliant.
posts.body:
## What is O. Reg. 406/19?

Ontario's On-Site and Excess Soil Management regulation came into force in January 2021, fundamentally changing how excess soil is managed across the province. Whether you're a constructor breaking ground on a new subdivision, a developer managing multiple sites, or a municipality handling road rehabilitation, this regulation almost certainly applies to you.

## Who Does It Apply To?

The regulation applies to any project that generates excess soil — soil that will be removed from the project area. There are two project classes:

- **Class 1 projects** — large-scale construction and infrastructure projects with the most comprehensive requirements
- **Class 2 projects** — smaller projects with a simplified but still mandatory set of requirements

## Key Compliance Requirements

- Excess Soil Management Plans (ESMPs) are mandatory for Class 1 projects
- All soil lots must be registered in the Ontario Excess Soil Registry
- Qualified Persons (QPs) must author and sign all key documents
- Receiving sites must complete an Excess Soil Destination Assessment before accepting any fill

## Common Mistakes to Avoid

1. Moving soil before an ESMP is registered
2. Using an unqualified consultant to prepare regulatory documents
3. Failing to register receiving sites before accepting fill
4. Incomplete chain-of-custody documentation during hauling

## Contact XS Soil Solutions

Not sure if your project is compliant? Our Qualified Persons provide free project assessments. Contact us at [info@xssoil.ca](mailto:info@xssoil.ca) or call 905-334-1197.

posts.title: Happy Easter
posts.excerpt: Wishing all our clients, partners, and friends across Ontario a wonderful Easter. From everyone at XS Soil Solutions, thank you for your continued trust and support.
posts.body:
As the season changes and spring takes hold across Ontario, the team at XS Soil Solutions wants to wish all of our clients, partners, and friends a very Happy Easter.

This time of year is a reminder of renewal — and for us, that means another busy construction season just around the corner. Whether you have projects starting this spring or are planning ahead for summer, we are here to help you manage excess soil compliantly and efficiently.

From Our Team to Yours

We are grateful for the trust you place in us on every project. If you have any upcoming projects that require an Excess Soil Management Plan, Soil Characterization Report, or any other regulatory support, do not hesitate to reach out.



\*\*Enjoy the long weekend with family and friends.\*\*
